title: Run an expectation suite and report results
description: Execute a validation suite against landed data and report which expectations passed/failed with row-level detail.
body: Use when checking a dataset's quality. Actions: detect the validation framework (Great Expectations or equivalent) and the target dataset, run the suite, and report each expectation's pass/fail, the failing rows or counts, and which quality dimension each covers. Compare results against the configured thresholds. Do not declare data clean from a partial or unrun suite. This skill exposes capability only and must not gate production promotion without runtime permission. Validation signals include a full suite result with thresholds. Risk boundary: if key dimensions (freshness, completeness, uniqueness) lack checks, report coverage gaps rather than calling the data validated.
